name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_kpi_7_to_14_its_asset_uptime
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_kpi_7_to_14_its_asset_uptime' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ExportDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ConstructionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`constructiondate_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`evaluation_start_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`evaluation_end_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Uptime` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ExportDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ConstructionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`constructiondate_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`evaluation_start_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`evaluation_end_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Uptime` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'DeltaUTC|ModifiedUTC|ExportDateUTC|ModifiedUser|ConstructionDate|DisposalDate|ConditionDate|constructiondate_date|evaluation_start_date|evaluation_end_date|Date|Uptime' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_kpi_7_to_14_its_asset_uptime`

error.message:
[INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS] Insufficient privileges:
Table 'uvw_kpi_7_to_14_its_asset_uptime' does not have sufficient privilege to execute because the owner of one of the underlying resources failed an authorization check. SQLSTATE: 42501
